mapper.select: select * from meal_plan_manual_replace where meal_plan_id = #{mealPlanId} and deleted = 0 order by dish_type, dish_id, customer_code
mapper.update: update meal_plan_manual_replace set deleted = 1 where meal_plan_id = #{mealPlanId} and deleted = 0
mapper.delete: delete from meal_plan_manual_replace where meal_plan_id = #{mealPlanId} and deleted = 1

select.if:
select * from meal_plan_manual_replace where deleted = 0 and customer_plan_id in
#{id}
